sentences.english: The best thing about living in an apartment is the location.
I'm close to everything — work, shops, restaurants.
sentences.korean: 모든 것에 가까워요 — 직장 가게 식당.

sentences.english: The worst part is the noise.
You can hear everything your neighbors do through the walls.
sentences.korean: 벽 너머로 이웃이 하는 모든 소리가 들려요.

sentences.english: I wish I had a garden or a balcony at least.
Living in a small space can feel claustrophobic sometimes.
sentences.korean: 좁은 공간에 사는 건 가끔 답답할 수 있어요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
